name: DCard
_comment_admob: android_app_id / ios_app_id below are GOOGLE TEST App IDs (safe, valid). Replace with your REAL AdMob App IDs (ca-app-pub-XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX~YYYYYYYYYY) before a production release. Banner ad-UNIT ids are configured server-side in Admin > Settings > Ads (admob_android_banner_id / admob_ios_banner_id) and toggled with admob_enabled.
